author: USA_Trafficking
displayName: Jane Doe (Boston Celtics Sex Trafficking Lawsuit)
text:
Within 12 hours after I distributed flyers on Saturday night (which was the night before the Boston Celtics first playoff game here in Boston), I became extremely sick with full body pain and chest pain, and was vomiting for 3 days after. This is unlikely not related to this situation and my flyer distribution, but this Country continues to refuse to do anything to help me.

I continue to express that I do not feel comfortable living in this country because of the lack of help I have received and non existing proactive help, and that I want to move out of the country. I continue to be forced to stay. I continue to be blocked from what I need to move, and continue be forced into a job that I didn't chose while being blocked from the one that I did. Still, no one has offered me anything at all.

Boston cheers for the Boston Celtics while this is happening, and no one is doing anything.

author: TBNewsFr
text: 🚩Après 4 500 ans passés dans une fosse scellée, voici la barque solaire de Khéops, 43 mètres de long en cèdre du Liban, construite sans aucun clou métallique. Des planches assemblées par tenons et mortaises et des cordages qui se resserrent lorsqu'ils sont mouillés. Quelle construction moderne pourrait survivre à 45 siècles ?
